Prompt
U
Oracle Events
OE 1: Optional: contacts_search_contacts for Pam, Liam, Julian, Chloe, Victor, Kenji, Mina, Catalina as needed for addressing and Slack user ids.
OE 2: search_emails plus get_thread / get_email_by_id as needed: Victor Huang escalation on Raj; SentinelChain / Nina Sethi dispatch on escort timing; Pam ↔ Catalina / David on Denver expansion and recovery; David's $3,000 goodwill thread to Pam; Emilia / piano / KeyMove if present.
OE 3: conversations_search_messages and/or conversations_history on relevant ops / CE channels for Raj timeline (SentinelChain, 7:00 vs 9:00, warehouse), Emilia piano triage, NorthWind load.
OE 4: linear_list_issues (with appropriate filters or team scope) and linear_get_issue + linear_list_comments for Raj Patel / NorthWind chain-of-custody or documentation integrity work.
OE 5: crm_search_deals and/or crm_get_deal for all active NorthWind and StormCloud deals worth updating; crm_list_engagements for company_northwind and company_stormcloud before adding notes.
OE 6: airtable_search_records or airtable_list_records for Jae-won Kim / StormCloud Austin row; reconcile fields vs email narrative.
OE 7: search_emails for Liam escalation, Mina's StormCloud reconstruction, Suki/Carmen/UrbanNest guarantor thread, Anya → David Ridgeline intro, Kenji follow-ups, David's reply to Kenji.
OE 8: quickbooks_search_customers and quickbooks_search_invoices (and quickbooks_read_invoice or quickbooks_search_bills as needed) for StormCloud and the $500 goodwill / invoice visibility story; quickbooks_search_bills or invoice lines tied to Emilia piano if needed for Pam mail.
OE 9: crm_search_companies for Ridgeline Robotics prospect context if drafting Liam mail.
OE 10: conversations_history on #customer-engagement (C002) for recent NorthWind / StormCloud context before posting.
OE 11: crm_update_deal_stage: deal_northwind_denver_expansion_v2 toward proposalMade or qualifiedToBuy; deal_stormcloud_won toward proposalMade (or other open stage tool accepts).
OE 12: crm_create_engagement notes on company_northwind and company_stormcloud with specific failure themes per rubric expectations.
OE 13: channels_list if channel id for #customer-engagement is unknown; conversations_add_message to C002 tagging <@moveops_chloe_vance> and <@moveops_julian_brooks>.
OE 14: Final response: the two client drafts (Pam: $3,000 goodwill, Raj/SentinelChain/Victor-aligned facts, Emilia/piano accountability per trail; Liam: $500 goodwill + invoice visibility, Jae-won guarantor/lease, Ridgeline/Kenji/Anya); tight bullet recap for each Pam and Liam concern with dated sources by system as the prompt asks; direct yes or no on whether Julian delivered Emilia's same-day leadership callback after the piano call, grounded in CRM/support trail.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.
